duties.name: Collect some sandy seafood
duties.how: Collect 30 Scallop, Clam or Oyster. When collecting them, the number of seafood in the stack counts.

duties.name: Cook a Seafood Platter
duties.how: You can cook Oyster Platter, Seafood Platter or Large Seafood Platter.

duties.name: Try on your Ivory and Gold Toga Dress
duties.how: Put on the Ivory and Gold Toga Dress

duties.name: Remove Night Thorns with Hercules
duties.how: To fulfill this duty, clear the territory of the Village from , Splinters of Fate or Inkies while you hang out with Hercules.

duties.name: Collect Stones or Marble
duties.how: Pick up 100 Stones or Marble. When pick up, the number in the stack counts. You can place a stack of Stone or Marble on the ground and pick it up again.

duties.name: Take a photo of a true hero's House
duties.how: Take a photo so that the Hercules' Villa building is in the frame.

duties.name: Give a Villager their favorite gifts
Hang out with Phil
duties.how: To fulfill this duty, you need to spend 45 minutes hanging out with Phil.

duties.name: Craft any Training Manual
duties.how: Craft any Training Manual. Different manuals require different ingredients, but each one will require 5000 .

duties.name: Hang out with Hercules
duties.how: To fulfill this duty, you need to spend 45 minutes hanging out with Hercules.

duties.name: Mine with Hercules
duties.how: To fulfill this duty, 25 times mine Gems while you hang out with Hercules.

duties.name: Bring gems or minerals to a grumpy satyr
duties.how: Give gems or minerals to gifts to Phil. For example, Vitalys Crystal. }
